name: cosmo-onboarding-products
description: Example Cosmo plugin application for products subgraph

scripts.build-linux: CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o bin/linux_arm64 ./src
scripts.publish:ci: wgc router plugin publish --namespace default --label graph=demo --fail-on-composition-error .
scripts.subgraph:check: wgc subgraph check reviews --namespace default --label graph=demo --schema ./src/schema.graphql
